company: Haystack (recruiting on behalf of a partner company)
title: Marketing Manager
required_skills: Marketing mix and customer segmentation tools
Brand communication, corporate identity, and campaign management
Managing external service providers and marketing budgets
matched_skills: Marketing strategy development (B2B GTM strategy across 4 product launches at IPC)
Marketing mix and customer segmentation (cross-channel analytics, cohort analysis)
CRM analytics (listed as skill; no Salesforce specifically)
Cross-functional collaboration (aligned Marketing, Sales, Engineering at GRG)
External vendor and channel partner management (IPC)
Marketing budget and ROI tracking (KPI/ROI reporting at IPC)
Competitor monitoring and market research (recurring competitor reports at IPC; competitive analysis at ECE)
Sales support (pre-sales support and product demos to 100+ B2B clients at GRG)
missing_skills: Salesforce CRM (specifically named; candidate has CRM analytics experience but no Salesforce mention)
Brand communication ownership and corporate identity management
Digital marketing campaign execution (candidate's background is analytics-side, not campaign ownership)
CRM user training and process ownership
core_responsibilities: Develop long-term marketing strategies by analyzing market trends, competitor landscapes, and technological advancements
Manage the marketing mix and product portfolio in close collaboration with product management, technical teams, and sales
Create pricing concepts with sales and use customer feedback for strategic development
Oversee CRM tools and processes, including user training
Ensure consistent brand communication through brand management, corporate identity, and digital marketing campaigns
recommended_emphasis: Lead with the exact title match: Marketing Manager at IPC with B2B GTM execution and measurable revenue impact (4.6M CNY)
Highlight cross-functional alignment experience (Marketing, Sales, Engineering) to address collaboration requirement
Emphasise external vendor management and SOPs at IPC to cover 'managing external service providers' requirement
Frame competitor monitoring reports and market research as direct evidence of strategic marketing analysis
Position CRM analytics and customer segmentation skills as CRM-adjacent; note willingness to learn Salesforce
Quantify ROI and KPI reporting to reinforce data-driven marketing strategy capability
Cite pre-sales support and materials delivery at GRG to address 'support the sales team' responsibility

company_info.note: Haystack is a recruiting intermediary; actual employer is undisclosed. No company size signals found in JD text. LinkedIn company_url not provided for fallback lookup.
